```lean4
def Comma_category_dom {D C E : Type*} [CC : Category C] [CD : Category D] [CE : Category E]
    (F : Functor D C) (G : Functor E C) :
    Functor (Σ (d : D) (e : E), Category.Hom (F.F d) (G.F e)) D where
  F := fun ⟨X, _, _⟩ => X
  homF := fun ⟨hk, _⟩ => hk.1
  map_id X := by
    simp [Prod.mk.injEq, Prod.ext_iff]
    <;>
    (try { aesop }) <;>
    (try { simp_all [F, homF, map_id, map_comp] }) <;>
    (try { aesop }) <;>
    (try { simp_all [F, homF, map_id, map_comp] }) <;>
    (try { aesop })
  map_comp f g := by
    simp [Prod.mk.injEq, Prod.ext_iff]
    <;>
    (try { aesop }) <;>
    (try { simp_all [F, homF, map_id, map_comp] }) <;>
    (try { aesop }) <;>

simp [id]
    <;>
    aesop
  
  map_comp f g := by
    simp_all [comp]
    <;>
    aesop
  
instance Comma_category {D C E : Type*} [CC : Category C] [CD : Category D] [CE : Category E]
    (F : Functor D C) (G : Functor E C) :
    Category (Σ (d : D) (e : E), Category.Hom (F.F d) (G.F e)) where
  Hom := fun ⟨d, e, f⟩ ⟨d', e', f'⟩ =>
    {hk : (CD.Hom d d' × CE.Hom e e') // (F.homF hk.1) ≫ f' = f ≫ (G.homF hk.2)}
  
  id := fun ⟨d, e, f⟩ => ⟨(id d, id e), by
    simp only
    rw [F.map_id, G.map_id]
    rw [id_comp, comp_id]
  ⟩
  
  comp := fun ⟨f, hf⟩ ⟨f', hf'⟩ => ⟨(f.1 ≫ f'.1, f.2 ≫ f'.2), by
    rw [Functor.map_comp, Functor.map_comp]
    rw [Category.assoc]
    rw [hf']
    rw [← Category.assoc]
    rw [hf]
    rw [Category.assoc]
  ⟩
  
  id_comp := by
    intro ⟨d, e, f⟩
    simp [comp, id]
    <;>
    aesop
  
  comp_id := by
    intro ⟨d, e, f⟩
    simp [comp, id]
    <;>
    aesop
  
  assoc := by
    intro ⟨f, hf⟩ ⟨f', hf'⟩ ⟨f'', hf''⟩
    simp [comp]
    <;>
    aesop

cases X with
    | mk X hX =>
      cases hX with
      | mk Y hY =>
        simp [id]
  
  map_comp f g := by
    cases f with
    | mk hk hhk =>
      cases g with
      | mk hk' hhk' =>
        simp_all [comp]
        <;>
        (try cases hk <;> cases hk' <;> simp_all [comp])
        <;>
        (try simp_all [comp])
        <;>
        (try ext <;> simp_all [comp])
        <;>
        (try ext <;> simp_all [comp])

simp_all [F.map_comp, G.map_comp])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [CD.id_comp, CD.comp_id, CE.id_comp, CE.comp_id, CC.id_comp, CC.comp_id])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [CD.map_id, CE.map_id, CC.map_id])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [CD.map_comp, CE.map_comp, CC.map_comp])
    <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try rfl)
  apply h_main
